_comment: Shortcut to Mushrooms (LTR, {1}{G} enchantment). End-step trigger gated on Gap 19's per-player 'permanent you controlled left the battlefield this turn' tracker. The scenario stages Cirith Ungol Patrol (LTR sac outlet) ready to sacrifice Mirkwood Spider, which sets the LTB tracker; Snarling Warg is the target for the +1/+1 counter at your end step. Shortcut to Mushrooms is already on the battlefield so no Ring temptation gets in the way of the test.
